The '''''Buzzzer''''' was the [[Series IV picket ship]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Bonestar Pirates|Bonestar Pirate]] [[Loka Hask]], named after an [[Buzzzer|insect]] from [[Eiattu 6]].

==History==
In [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]], when Loka Hask was trying to escape [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]], he purposely had ''Buzzzer'' take off from the [[Gus Treta/Legends|Gus Treta]] fueling station while the re-fueling lines were still attached to it which caused an explosion and nearly destroyed the entire spacestation.

The destruction of the Gus Treta and the death of his parents who were onboard caused a young [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] to seek vengeance. Piloting a [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] borrowed from [[Booster Terrik]], Wedge tracked the pirates to the [[Jumus system/Legends|Jumus system]] where the ship had come to rest due to an infestation of [[Corellian limpet]]s which had clogged the ship's thrusters. There Wedge caught up with the pirates, and catching them off-guard, he coldly destroyed ''Buzzzer''.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 6|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 6]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
